title: Cloudflare Pages vs Supabase
description: Compare Cloudflare Pages vs Supabase in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right developer tools tool.

faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Cloudflare Pages for large teams, while Supabase may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free – $200/mo pricing.
